subcodes.first_line: O spiritual, divine friends! 'Abdu'l-Bahá was imprisoned in the fortress of 'Akká for forty-three years, and in the final days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی ربانی عبدالبهاء چهل و سه سال در سجن عکا مسجون و ایام اخیر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha
